venueAddress: 3708 Las Vegas Blvd S, Las Vegas, NV 89109
scopeOfWork:
HANDS Logistics will operate this multi-day brand experience as the on-site execution partner from initial load-in through final strike. Scope includes all pre-event sourcing and warehouse staging, rigging and installation of branded environment, daily activation operation including bar service and brand ambassador deployment, end-of-night reset and re-stocking, ongoing inventory tracking, and final strike with full materials accounting.

Daily operations include morning prep and bar setup, scheduled service hours with full crew, end-of-day cleanup and inventory reconciliation, and security handoff to venue. HANDS provides crew rotation across days to maintain freshness and consistency. Mid-week deliveries from the warehouse are coordinated as needed for restocks and replenishment.

The scope includes a dedicated HANDS project manager on-site for the duration of the activation, daily client check-ins with photos and metrics, and a final post-event recap deck delivered within 5 business days of strike.
paymentTerms: 50% deposit due on acceptance via PayPal invoice. Balance net 15 from event end date. Late balance subject to 1.5%/mo finance charge. Cancellations within 7 days of event subject to 50% retention of total.

designSlides.caption: Inspiration: Glamour, but make it July.

deliverables.title: Liberty Chandelier — full installation package
deliverables.notes: F34 truss rig, 5-tier Leyland-style acrylic chandelier (Ruby/Pearl/Sapphire), art deco foam facade (UV-printed PVC arch pattern), 13 layered acrylic star bursts, white snow-cone cart with Tito's wordmark, syrups + equipment, 4-person rigging crew. Production palette: #9B1B30 Ruby / #F5F1E8 Pearl / #1B3A6B Sapphire.

deliverables.title: Liberty Chandelier — 5-tier acrylic prism chandelier (Leyland-style)
deliverables.dimensions: 48" Ø × 39" H overall Tier I (top, Ruby):    48" W × 7.8" H — 80 prisms Tier II (Ruby):        40" Ø × 7.8" H — 64 prisms Tier III (Pearl):      32" Ø × 7.8" H — 52 prisms Tier IV (Sapphire):    24" Ø × 7.8" H — 40 prisms Tier V (bottom):       16" Ø × 7.8" H — 28 prisms Total: 264 prisms Assembled weight: ~148 lbs
deliverables.notes: Inspired by Arhaus "Leyland 56-Light Tiered Round Chandelier". Central CNC aluminum armature with brushed brass finish; 5 ring caps stacked top-to-bottom (largest at top). Prisms: 1/8" cast acrylic, CNC routed to 1" × 7.8" capsule profile, hand-finished.

deliverables.title: F34 truss rig — goal-post configuration (6-day rental)
deliverables.dimensions: 14' W × 11' H (168" × 132") Cross-section: 12" × 12" box truss Two vertical legs (118" tall) + one horizontal top beam (168" wide) Base plates: 24" × 24" steel, sandbagged Load rating: 250 lbs distributed

deliverables.title: Art Deco foam facade — UV-printed arch-pattern wrap
deliverables.dimensions: 3 beam panels + 4 leg panels + 4 corner caps Beam panels: 56" W × 14" H each (3 sections × covering 168" beam) Leg panels: 14" W × 118" H each (one outer + one inner per leg) Corner caps: 14" × 14" L-profile Material thickness: 4" carved EPS foam + 1/8" PVC face panel Total foam square footage: ~220 sq ft (full wrap, including side returns) — order 7 sheets of 4'×8' EPS

deliverables.title: Layered acrylic star bursts — 8-point cutouts
deliverables.dimensions: 16" each 3–4 stacked layers per star (1/4" cast acrylic each) Layer step: 20% smaller per layer, rotated 22.5° between layers 13 stars total — 4 on beam top edge, 3 on beam bottom edge, 2 on each outer leg edge, 1 on each inner leg edge
deliverables.notes: 1/4" cast acrylic (back layer biggest, front layer smallest). Layers bonded with edge-grade adhesive; magnetic mounting on rear plate. Stars mount so their centers sit ON the foam panel edge — half-overhanging the frame for sculptural shadow play. Asymmetric placement is intentional — palette/color rhythm distributed by hand, not gridded.

deliverables.title: Tito's snow cone cart — custom branded service cart
deliverables.dimensions: 28" W × 36" D × 50" H (front face) Body height: 23" — Leg/cross-bar: 11" — Wheel: 14" (single, left side)
